description:
Advances: specled.package

Empirically-proven defects from the specled_-123 critical-review + forensic audit
(evidence: vault code_review/critical/specled_ex/2026-07-22/specled_-123-bootstrap-gaps/20260722-203631-empirical.md).
All pre-existing (not introduced by specled_-123), but 2 sit in files that branch edited.
Landing on branch specled_-123/bootstrap-gaps so the PR ships a corpus that is actually correct.

In scope:
1. \`:off\` YAML inert form (PROVEN, High): YamlElixir parses \`code: :off\` as string ":off";
   SpecLedEx.Config drops it with an unsurfaced diagnostic — override 100% silently inert.
   Fix 7 instances to bare \`off\`: skills/spec-led-bootstrap/references/configurable-levers.md:75,76,77,83,84
   and references/task-templates.md:462,463. Also add one explicit warning line in
   configurable-levers.md's severity-ladder section: YAML files use bare tokens (off/info/warning/error);
   Elixir-atom form \`:off\` in YAML is a silent no-op.
2. Fabricated \`parser/*\` namespace (PROVEN): detection-matrix.md:90-93. Replace with the real
   validator codes (missing_requirement_id, duplicate_requirement_id, missing_scenario_id,
   duplicate_scenario_id) and rephrase yaml_error/unsupported_block as parse-failure conditions,
   not finding codes.
3. docs/adoption.md:173 \`append_only/modal_downgraded\` -> \`append_only/must_downgraded\` (PROVEN).
   Also docs/adoption.md ~line 390 umbrella "v1.1" promise -> capability-probe wording, and align its
   CI-gate phase placement with the skill's phase2 CI wiring (spec reviewer F6).
4. docs/concepts.md:493 \`branch_guard_test_only_change\` fabricated code (PROVEN) -> describe the real
   mechanism (Spec-Drift: test_only trailer downgrading branch_guard_missing_subject_update).
5. Coverage-skip opt-out code set (review F4): SKILL.md 4.4 and task-templates skipped-phases list
   2 codes; configurable-levers lists 3. Align all to the 3 coverage-tier codes
   (untested_realization, untethered_test, underspecified_realization).
6. Security caveat (review F2, doc side): one short paragraph in the phase2 CI guidance
   (adoption-phases.md phase2 + task-templates phase2): the scaffolded workflow builds PR code with a
   write-scoped token in the same job that deploys; recommend splitting build and deploy jobs / keeping
   the render job read-only until the template is hardened (see follow-up ticket).
7. THE GATE: new test test/docs_identifier_lint_test.exs — corpus-scoped lint that extracts every
   finding-code-shaped token (append_only/*, overlap/*, branch_guard_*) from skills/**/*.md, docs/*.md,
   README.md and asserts membership in the code-truth sets (BranchCheck per-code defaults + tag_findings
   + validator codes), and rejects the atom-form severity value pattern (colon-prefixed off/info/warning/error)
   inside yaml blocks in those files. Add a matching \`specled.package.doc_identifier_integrity\`
   requirement to .spec/specs/package.spec.md covered by tagged_tests (@tag spec:). This converts the
   entire defect class from reviewer-diligence to CI.

Out of scope (follow-up tickets exist): hardening priv/spec_init/workflows/spec_review.yml.eex job
split; surfacing config diagnostics in spec.validate/check; skill-doc dedup refactor.

Verification: mix test test/docs_identifier_lint_test.exs (must fail if any of defects 1-4 are
reintroduced — prove by temporary mutation locally, do not commit); mix spec.check --base origin/main;
full merge gates before PR.

comments.text:
VERIFY: PASS
Session: cold-verifier-ci0

Mechanical checks (files touched vs scope): all 9 files in 4c059d7 fall inside ticket scope (skills/spec-led-bootstrap/**, docs/adoption.md, docs/concepts.md, test/docs_identifier_lint_test.exs, .spec/specs/package.spec.md). No scope violations.

Semantic checks (item-by-item, executed evidence):
1. :off inert form — grep -rn ': :off' skills/ docs/ empty; configurable-levers.md:75-77 + task-templates.md:468-470 now bare off; new severity-ladder warning present and accurate (config.ex @severity_tokens keys are bare strings "off"/"info"/"warning"/"error"; YAML ":off" is is_binary but not a key -> unknown_severity_diag drop; "unsurfaced" matches out-of-scope follow-up). PASS
2. parser/* namespace — grep for parser/missing_id|duplicate_id|yaml_error|unsupported_block empty; detection-matrix.md now names only missing/duplicate_requirement_id + missing/duplicate_scenario_id (all grep-confirmed in lib/); parse-failure prose matches parser.ex (push_parse_error "spec-meta decode failed:", parse_errors list; find_spec_tag nil -> spec unchanged = unknown fence silently ignored). PASS
3. adoption.md — no modal_downgraded anywhere (only must_downgraded, real); no v1.1; Phase-2 "Wire CI here" block placed in Phase 2 section, consistent with skill adoption-phases.md phase2 workflow wiring. PASS
4. concepts.md — no branch_guard_test_only_change in docs; replacement matches trailer.ex @preset_mappings "test_only" => %{"branch_guard_missing_subject_update" => :info}. PASS
5. coverage-skip 3-code set identical in all three: SKILL.md 4.4 (407-408), task-templates (468-470), configurable-levers (75-77) = untested_realization/untethered_test/underspecified_realization. PASS
6. security caveat present in adoption-phases.md phase2 + task-templates.md phase2, refs specled_-3q1; claims match spec_review.yml.eex — single `render` job runs PR code (mix spec.review), holds contents:write + pull-requests:write, deploys gh-pages + comments in same job. Accurate. PASS
7. mix test test/docs_identifier_lint_test.exs = 2 tests, 0 failures. New req specled.package.doc_identifier_integrity (package.spec.md:78) covered by tagged_tests (line 92); test @tag matches exactly. spec.check --base origin/main --no-run-commands exit 0, findings=0, no trailer needed.

Mutation tests:
(a) overlap/nonexistent_thing in NESTED skills/.../detection-matrix.md -> FAIL naming file:line. PASS
(b) atom-form ": :error" in yaml block -> FAIL "must be bare tokens". PASS
(c) branch_guard_totally_made_up in README.md -> FAIL naming README.md:319; skills/**/*.md catches nested paths; docs has no nested subdirs so docs/*.md flat is complete. PASS
(d) all 22 allowlist codes exist in lib; all 7 BranchCheck @per_code_defaults branch_guard_* codes are allowlisted; no fabricated allowlist entries. PASS
Tree clean after all mutations (git status --short empty).

Corpus sweep (whole repo incl priv/ and .spec/, which the lint does NOT scan): 3 stray finding-code-shaped tokens, ALL in .spec/ (out of lint corpus AND out of ticket scope):
- branch_guard_test_only_change — .spec/specs/triangulation.spec.md:155 + .spec/decisions/specled.decision.finding_code_budget.md:47 (SAME fabrication item 4 removed from concepts.md; survives in the spec corpus).
- branch_guard_missing_subject_update_attested — .spec/decisions/file_touch_yields_to_realization.md:108 (not emitted by lib).
- branch_guard_test — .spec/specs/branch_guard.spec.md:23 = FALSE POSITIVE (test filename branch_guard_test.exs), not a defect.

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only): (1) The lint corpus intentionally excludes .spec/ (validated by mix spec.validate instead), so the two genuine stray codes above are not gated. They are out of THIS ticket's scope; worth a follow-up to either add .spec/ to the lint or reconcile the finding-code budget. (2) docs/*.md is non-recursive; harmless today (no nested docs) but would miss a future docs/sub/*.md.

APPROVED per cold corpus-scoped verification (VERIFY: PASS on 4c059d7; all 7 items verified by execution, 4/4 mutations trip the gate). Advisory .spec/ lint-extension gap ticketed as specled_-6fn. Closing.

title: Doc-identifier integrity: fix 4 proven fabricated/inert identifier defects + add corpus lint gate
